text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Pulmonary examination: bilateral vesicular murmur, no additional pathological noise Cardiac examination: valid rhythmic tones, apparently free pauses, normal pulses, no peripheral edema.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Abdominal examination: abdomen flat, palpable, no murmurs or palpable masses.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "PERSONS_NAME, PERSONS_NAME, PERSONS_NAME - hyperemic pharynx, enlarged and edematous uvula.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "no plaques or purulent secretions.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "diffuse capillary ruptures, particularly at the around the uvula.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "upper left molar tooth decayed, likely abscessed.", 0.0, 0.5)
